title: rubus pilosus var. carpinifolius
intro: Rubus pilosus var. carpinifolius is a lesser-known variety of the thorny shrub, commonly known as the raspberry, with leaves similar to those of the hornbeam tree. The medicinal properties of Rubus pilosus var. carpinifolius are attributed to its high content of antioxidants, vitamins, and minerals, which have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce oxidative stress, and alleviate symptoms of digestive issues and skin conditions. Rubus pilosus var. carpinifolius can be consumed as a tea, made from the leaves and young shoots, or used in tinctures and salves for topical applications.
